flashing.wiring: Pull GPIO0 to GND, hold EN (reset) LOW then HIGH while GPIO0 stays low, then release GPIO0 to enter download mode.
manualSteps: Wire a USB-to-serial adapter: TX to GPIO3 (U0RXD), RX to GPIO1 (U0TXD), GND to GND, 3V3 to 3V3.
Flash, then disconnect GPIO0 from GND and reset to run.
flashing.note: A bare module has no USB or auto-reset - use a carrier board or wire an adapter as above.
